task.name: Visualization Polish & Integration
task.description: Comprehensive visualization layer update: belief visualization, export capabilities, overlay toggles, Edgeworth box trade detail, agent perspective mode, and advanced overlays. Brings the visualization to full capability as specified in VISUALIZATION.md.

vision_extraction.primary_goal: Make economic institutions visible through visualization - enabling researchers to see abstract concepts come alive through spatial simulation
deliverables: Overlay toggles (trails, perception radius, trade network, heatmaps)

context.gap_analysis_summary: Core visualization exists (grid, agents, animations, comparison mode, time-series). Missing: overlay toggles, belief visualization, export, Edgeworth box, agent perspective mode. Belief data is logged but not displayed.

phases.name: Overlay Infrastructure & Toggles
phases.description: Add toggle panel to control overlay visibility. Make existing overlays (trails, perception radius) toggleable. Establish pattern for future overlays.
phases.exit_criteria: Toggle panel visible, trails and perception radius can be toggled on/off, toggle state persists during session

phases.name: Belief Visualization
phases.description: Surface agent belief data in the UI. Extend tooltips, add belief panel for selected agents, add visual encoding of belief relationships between agents.
phases.entry_criteria: Phase 1 complete, toggle infrastructure in place
phases.exit_criteria: Belief data visible in hover tooltips, selected agent shows belief panel, belief connections render between agents

phases.name: Export Capabilities
phases.description: Add export functionality for screenshots, animations, and data. Support publication-quality output.
phases.exit_criteria: Can export PNG screenshots, GIF animations, and CSV/JSON data from UI

phases.name: Trade Zoom & Edgeworth Box
phases.description: Implement trade detail view with Edgeworth box visualization showing pre/post allocations, indifference curves, and contract curve.
phases.exit_criteria: Click on trade opens detail modal, Edgeworth box renders correctly, theoretical elements (indifference curves, contract curve) display

phases.name: Agent Perspective Mode
phases.description: Add mode to view simulation from a specific agent's information state. Show what agent observes vs ground truth.
phases.exit_criteria: Can toggle perspective mode, select agent perspective, display reflects agent's observations under noisy information

phases.name: Advanced Overlays
phases.description: Add trade network overlay and surplus heatmap overlay. Integrate with toggle system from Phase 1.
phases.entry_criteria: Phase 5 complete, toggle infrastructure from Phase 1
phases.exit_criteria: Trade network overlay shows who has traded with whom, surplus heatmap shows opportunity density

features.name: Toggle Panel UI
features.description: Add a collapsible panel in the metrics area with toggle controls for overlays. Establish consistent toggle pattern.

functional: Toggle panel renders in metrics area
Panel can be collapsed/expanded
Toggle controls are checkboxes or switches

features.name: Movement Trails Toggle
features.description: Make movement trails toggleable. Default to ON for backward compatibility.

functional: Toggle control for trails exists
When OFF, no trails render
When ON, trails render as before
Default is ON

features.name: Perception Radius Toggle
features.description: Add toggle for perception radius overlay. When enabled, shows radius for selected agent (existing behavior) OR all agents.

functional: Toggle control for perception radius exists
Can show radius for selected agent only
Can show radius for all agents
When OFF, no radius overlay renders

features.name: Belief Tooltip Extension
features.description: Extend hover tooltip to show belief summary: number of type beliefs, price belief mean/variance, memory depth.

functional: Tooltip shows 'Beliefs: X type beliefs' when agent has beliefs
Tooltip shows price belief summary if available
Tooltip shows memory depth
Graceful handling when agent has no beliefs

features.name: Belief Panel for Selected Agent
features.description: When agent is selected, show detailed belief panel: list of type beliefs (who, believed alpha, confidence), price belief distribution.

functional: Belief panel appears when agent with beliefs is selected
Panel lists type beliefs with target agent, believed alpha, confidence
Panel shows price belief mean and variance
Panel updates when stepping through replay
property: All displayed values match logged BeliefSnapshot

features.name: Belief Connection Lines
features.description: Draw lines between agents representing belief relationships. Line thickness or opacity encodes confidence level.

functional: Toggle control for belief connections exists
Lines render between agents with type beliefs
Line appearance varies with confidence
property: Lines only appear for agent pairs with TypeBeliefSnapshot entries

features.name: Belief Evolution in Replay
features.description: In replay mode, belief visualization updates as timeline scrubs. Show belief changes over time.

functional: Belief panel updates when tick changes
Belief connections update when tick changes
Can observe belief evolution by scrubbing timeline
property: Each tick's display matches that tick's BeliefSnapshot

features.name: PNG Screenshot Export
features.description: Export current visualization state as PNG image. Support configurable resolution for publication quality.

functional: Export button/menu item exists
Click triggers file save dialog or saves to configured path
PNG file is created and valid
Resolution can be configured (1x, 2x, custom DPI)

features.name: SVG Vector Export
features.description: Export current visualization as SVG for publication figures that require vector graphics.

functional: SVG export option exists
SVG file is created and valid
SVG can be opened in vector editors

features.name: GIF Animation Export
features.description: Export simulation replay as animated GIF. Configurable frame rate and duration.

functional: GIF export option exists (replay mode)
Can specify start/end ticks
Can configure frame rate
GIF file is created and plays correctly

features.name: Data Export (CSV/JSON)
features.description: Export simulation data as CSV or JSON for external analysis. Include agent states, trades, beliefs.

functional: Data export option exists
Can choose CSV or JSON format
Can select what data to include (agents, trades, beliefs)
Exported file is valid and parseable

features.name: Trade Click Detection
features.description: Detect clicks on trade animations or trade events in timeline. Open trade detail view on click.

functional: Clicking on active trade animation opens detail view
Clicking on trade marker in timeline opens detail view
Trade detail modal/panel appears

features.name: Edgeworth Box Rendering
features.description: Render Edgeworth box diagram showing 2-agent, 2-good allocation space with correct axes and orientation.

functional: Edgeworth box renders in trade detail view
Axes labeled correctly (good X, good Y)
Origin for agent A at bottom-left, agent B at top-right
Total endowment determines box dimensions

features.name: Edgeworth Box Content
features.description: Draw trade-relevant content in Edgeworth box: initial endowment, final allocation, indifference curves, contract curve.

functional: Initial endowment point marked
Final allocation point marked
Indifference curves through both points for both agents
Contract curve displayed
Gains from trade region visible
property: Indifference curves computed from agent preferences
theory: Final allocation lies on contract curve (Pareto efficient)
Both agents on higher indifference curve after trade

features.name: Perspective Mode Toggle
features.description: Add toggle to switch between omniscient view and agent perspective view.

functional: Toggle control for perspective mode exists
Can switch between 'Omniscient' and 'Agent Perspective'
Agent selector appears when in perspective mode

features.name: Agent Perspective Rendering
features.description: In perspective mode, render what the selected agent observes. Dim/hide agents outside perception radius. Show observed types (not true types) under noisy information.

functional: Agents outside perception radius are dimmed or hidden
Selected agent highlighted
Perception radius circle displayed
property: Under NoisyAlphaInformation, agent colors reflect observed alpha (not true alpha)
Tooltip shows observed type, not true type

features.name: Perspective Comparison
features.description: Allow split view or toggle to compare agent's view vs ground truth. Useful for understanding information asymmetry effects.

functional: Can view ground truth alongside agent perspective
Differences between observed and true types are highlighted

features.name: Trade Network Overlay
features.description: Overlay showing trade relationships: edges between agents who have traded, edge thickness or color encoding trade frequency or recency.

functional: Toggle control for trade network exists
Edges render between agents who have traded
Edge appearance encodes trade information (frequency, recency, or surplus)
property: Edges correspond to actual trades in log

features.name: Surplus Heatmap Overlay
features.description: Heatmap overlay showing potential gains from trade across the grid. Highlights areas of high opportunity.

functional: Toggle control for surplus heatmap exists
Heatmap renders as color gradient over grid
Legend shows surplus scale
property: Heatmap values computed from agent pairwise surplus

resolved.choice: Centralized toggle state with observer pattern - VisualizationApp maintains dict of toggle states, render methods check state before drawing
resolved.rationale: Simple, matches existing pattern in app.py, easily extensible for new overlays

resolved.choice: Use DearPyGui's screenshot capability for PNG, Pillow for processing, imageio for GIF assembly
resolved.rationale: DearPyGui provides frame capture, Pillow/imageio are standard Python imaging libraries

resolved.choice: Render in separate DearPyGui window/modal using drawlist, compute curves numerically
resolved.rationale: Consistent with existing visualization approach, allows high-quality rendering

escalation_triggers: Changes to core simulation logic (src/microecon/simulation.py, agent.py, etc.) - visualization should be read-only consumer
Breaking changes to existing visualization functionality
Significant performance degradation (frame rate drops below 30fps with 50 agents)
Changes to logging format that would break replay compatibility
